eligible_applicant_type: individuals with a recognized undergraduate or postgraduate degree
individuals with at least two years of relevant work experience in a professional, managerial, or supervisory role
geographic_restrictions: None (100% online program, open to international applicants)
project_area: MA Early Childhood Education (100% online master's program)
demographic_requirements: None (open to all applicants meeting academic or work experience requirements)
eligibility_summary: Applicants must have a recognized undergraduate or postgraduate degree (or equivalent) OR at least two years of relevant work experience. English language proficiency is required for non-native speakers.
